name: Sook's Buttermilk Bisquits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450 degrees.
2. Mix together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
3. Cut in the lard using two forks until the mixture resembles small white gravel.
4. Pour in the buttermilk all at once.
5. Gently mix with a fork until combined.
6. Turn off heat.
7. Place dough on a floured board and knead 6-7 times.
8. Roll out to a half inch thickness.
9. Cut into desired shapes using floured water glasses.
10. Transfer to a greased baking sheet.
11. Bake until golden brown.
